programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Guau, Guau! Dora y Botas tienen un nuevo videojuego en el que un perrero mete a todos los cachorritos en jaulas. Para salvarlos, Dora y Botas tendrán que entrar en el videojuego.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas leen un cuento sobre Kinkajou, una linda criatura del bosque, la cual está destinada a ser rey. Pero Kikajou pierde su corona porque no sabe las palabras mágicas 'Por Favor'.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y Diego necesitan devolverle un bebé dinosaurio gigante a su mamá en la Isla Dinosaurio. Es una aventura prehistórica llena de diversión.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Hoy, Botas puede hacer lo que quiera porque es su día especial. Su cosa favorita en el mundo es ir a visitar a su papá al trabajo. ¡El papá de Botas está construyendo un parque de diversiones!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: El Camión de Rescate llega al Centro de Animales de Diego para dejar un animalito perdido: ¡un pingüino! Es el trabajo de Dora, Botas y Diego llevar a Pingüino hasta su casa en el Polo Sur.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: La prima de Dora, Daisy, jugará en un partido de fútbol que se trasmitirá por la televisión. Pero al equipo le falta una jugadora. Daisy le pide a Dora que sea ella quien complete el equipo. ¡Corre, Dora, corre!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es Halloween y Dora y Botas salen a pedir dulces hasta que un lindo monstruito los sorprende. Dora y Botas lo acompañan a llegar a casa antes de que las agujas del Gran Reloj marquen las doce.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué viene luego del Fin? Dora y Botas están terminando un cuento de hadas y llegan a su fin. Se preguntan qué pasa después y usan su imaginación para continuar la historia.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh, no! Tres de nuestros amigos están en problemas. El bebé Jaguar está atrapado en un árbol, Isa cayó en un pozo de arena y Benny está atrapado en el Géiser Pegajoso. ¿A quién rescatamos primero?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Dora y Botas están haciendo una pijamada! Es la hora de irse a dormir y Dora tiene su osito de peluche, pero Botas no puede encontrar a su dinosaurio. ¡Oh, no! Su dinosaurio debe haberse caído de su mochila cuando estaban en el parque.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Es la hora de una fiesta! A Dora y Botas los invitaron a la Gran Fiesta del Pollo Rojo. Habrá comida tonta, juegos tontos, y hasta bailes tontos. Pero, ¡el Gran Pollo Rojo ha perdido su pastel!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh oh! Botas tiene un hoyo en su bota, pero Dora sabe lo que debe hacer. ¡Vamos a la máquina arreglatodo!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A Botas le encanta el béisbol. Le encanta correr, lanzar y atrapar la pelota. Pero hasta ahora, nunca pudo batear. Dora y Botas tendrán un juego de béisbol y Botas está determinado a batear por primera vez en su vida.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es el día de los mejores amigos! En este día especial, Dora y Botas se van de picnic para celebrar. Botas lleva chocolate y Dora, deliciosas fresas. Pero, depende de nosotros ayudarlos a encontrarse en la Piedra Arco Iris.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A' es de Armadillo. Pero, ¿a dónde está el resto de los animales del libro del alfabeto? ¡Se han perdido! Dora y Botas se meten en el gigante libro para ayudar al armadillo a resolver el misterio.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué quiéres ser cuando seas grande? Dora y Botas prueban toda clase de trabajos, desde bomberos, hasta doctores y arqueólogos. Pero, ¿qué decidirá ser Dora cuando crezca?

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre hermanos se descontrola cuando Papá y Mamá vienen a visitar a Perro y Gato. / Perro realmente tiene un problema cuando descubre que su fuente de alimentación preferida proviene de animales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que le quitaran su disco volador. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras los perros grasos están preparando una trampa para CatDog, una ardilla accidentalmente se pega a la espalda de Cliff. /Debido a la escasez de fondos, CatDog opta por no intercambiar regalos en el “Día del hermano” este año.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cuando Perro desobedece las normas de la piscina de la comunidad, él y Gato son arrestados por el guardavidas y los llevan a prisión. / Gato se ve consumido al coleccionar figuras. A medida que su colección crece las figuras le hablan.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: ¿Es el final de Gato y Perro? Cansados de ser un dos cabezas, Gato decide hacerse una cirugía para separarse de Perro. / Perro y Gato una vez más corren por sus vidas de los Perros Grasosos hacia la seguridad de su casa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami gives love advice to a zombie, Luffy finds himself face-to-face with Gecko Moria, and Robin gets caught in spooky spider web. Things look bleak for the Straw Hats until their skeleton friend lends a hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook strikes the final blow in his battle with the spider monkey, Gecko Moria's devious plan is revealed, and Luffy's escape attempt leads to the loss of something he can't live without!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook tells Franky and Robin the secret to slaying zombies, and Gecko Moria reveals the terrifying monster that will be the recipient of Luffy's shadow!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise encounters the wrecked USS Constellation and its distraught commodore.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Very alien visitors to our galaxy attempt to connect with human consciousness but miss, winding up tapping into the regions of human nightmares instead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is taken over by a group of androids who are working for Kirk's old nemesis, Harry Mudd.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While returning to the Enterprise aboard the shuttlecraft, Kirk, Spock, McCoy and a seriously ill Federation diplomat find themselves kidnapped by an energized cloud.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Tensions run high when the Enterprise transports ambassadors to the Babel conferences.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew becomes embroiled in a local power struggle on a tribal planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A landing party, including the command staff, is infected with a disease that causes rapid aging and senility.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with a creature from Kirk's past that feeds on human blood.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and the Enterprise computer become detectives after Scotty is accused of murdering women on a pleasure planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is overrun by furry creatures while tangling with Klingons and bureaucrats.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, Chekov, and Uhura are kidnapped and forced to participate in a series of gladiatorial games.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk investigates a planet with an Earth-like 1920's gangster culture.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a gigantic energy draining space organism that threatens the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk becomes involved in an arms race when the Klingons equip a native people with superior weaponry.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: aquel país desconocido
programme.desc: Después de años de guerra, los imperios de la Federación y los klingon se encuentran al borde de conseguir la paz, cuando una nave klingon casi es destruida por un aparente ataque del Enterprise. Ambos mundos se preparan para un encuentro mortal.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: insurrección
programme.desc: Desde el principio de la Federación, la Primera Directiva fue clara. Ninguna expedición de la Flota Estelar podrá interferir con el desarrollo natural de otras civilizaciones. Pero ahora Picard está enfrentado con órdenes que debilitan ese decreto.

programme.title: Star Trek VIII: primer contacto
programme.desc: Se llaman a sí mismos los Borg, un colectivo mitad máquina con un solo propósito: Conquistar y asimilar todas las razas.

programme.title: Star Trek: la película
programme.desc: Cuando un alienígena no identificado destruye tres poderosos cruceros klingon, el capitán James T. Kirk (William Shatner) regresa al U.S.S. Enterprise™ para tomar el mando.

programme.title: Star Trek II: la ira de Khan
programme.desc: Es el siglo XXIII. La Federación Unida de Planetas Enterprise está haciendo maniobras de entrenamiento de rutina, y el almirante James T. Kirk parece resignado al hecho de que esta inspección puede ser la última misión espacial de su carrera.

programme.title: Star Trek III: la búsqueda de Spock
programme.desc: La derrota del almirante Kirk sobre Khan y la creación del planeta Génesis son victorias vacías. Spock está muerto y McCoy se ha vuelto inexplicablemente loco. Luego, una visita sorpresa de Sarek, el padre de Spock, provee una revelación sorprendente.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko attempts to force his traitorous former officer to stop a final Maquis attack that could lead to the destruction of the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: O'Brien, Garak, Nog, and a salvage team are stranded on a supposedly abandoned Cardassian space station.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Nog risk an intergalactic incident in an innocent quest to lift Sisko's spirits.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Deep Space Nine prepares to face a Dominion/Cardassian attack.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko and his crew embark on a secret mission in a captured Jem'Hadar warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko and his crew are stranded on a remote planet with a dying Vorta and a small group of Jem'Hadar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf must face his failures as a father when his estranged son volunteers for duty aboard a Klingon ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Sisko's promotion takes him away from the Defiant, Odo's loyalties are tested by the arrival of a fellow Shapeshifter.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Kira prepares for the destruction of the Federation minefield, Sisko plans to retake Deep Space Nine.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the minefield is soon to be demolished, Sisko leads a mission to take back Deep Space Nine.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf's plans for a traditional Klingon wedding are threatened when Martok's wife refuses to accept Dax into their family.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The alternate universe double of Kira's slain love requests asylum on Deep Space Nine.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Genetically engineered savants under Bashir's supervision predict doom for the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark leads a Ferengi mission to rescue his mother from the Dominion.

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
programme.desc: It’s the 23rd century and an alien power is evaporating the oceans. To save mankind, Kirk and his crew must time travel back to 1986 where they find a world of punk, pizza and exact-change buses that are as alien as anything they’ve ever encountered.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and his crew must deal with Mr. Spock's long-lost half-brother, who hijacks the Enterprise for an obsessive search for God at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
programme.desc: It’s the 23rd century and an alien power is evaporating the oceans. To save mankind, Kirk and his crew must time travel back to 1986 where they find a world of punk, pizza and exact-change buses that are as alien as anything they’ve ever encountered.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and his crew must deal with Mr. Spock's long-lost half-brother, who hijacks the Enterprise for an obsessive search for God at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picard’s only hope for a future rests within the Nexus...and a legendary captain from the past.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The new Starship Enterprise and its crew set out “to boldly go where no one has gone before." Their first mission is to explore the mystery surrounding the creation of the Farpoint station located on planet Deneb IV.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: At the trial, "Q" continues to denounce humans, while Picard defends his race and convinces "Q" that the upcoming mission at Farpoint will be the perfect opportunity to prove his point.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise is infected with a virus that causes them to behave as though they were intoxicated.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the leader of an alien culture takes a romantic interest in Lt. Yar, he claims her for his own, to the dismay of his own wife, who, in turn, challenges Tasha in a fight to the death.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a race known as the Ferengi, a race believed to be more pirates, than traders. But, in the course of the pursuit, all power is lost in the ship, just as the alien ship comes to bear.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is ordered to undergo a series of tests that will propel the ship at unfathomable speed, but Riker has misgivings surrounding the equations and theories presented by the arrogant designer.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As the Enterprise provides transportation to two delegate parties who are constantly at odds with each other, the ship is invaded by something that jumps from computer terminal to crew members and back again.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dropping off some colonists in a system nearby, The crew visits a world of beautiful, healthy & tanned human looking people who seem to have a peaceful & loving lifestyle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After waiting for a response to their hails for three days, Picard finds that the Ferengi have discovered the "Stargazer," an old ship that he once commanded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters Q again, and he tempts Riker by endowing him with the powers of the Q.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While on a mission to a planet called Haven, Counselor Troi meets her husband to be, a marriage arranged by her father years before, as the Enterprise encounters a ship far deadlier than any combat could provide.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Captain Picard and some of his crew are caught in a deadly trap in the holodeck as the result of a ship-wide scan from an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise visits the planet where Data was created and discovers another android like him, but when he's assembled, he's not EXACTLY like him.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker, Troi, Data and Yar beam down to a planet ruled by a matriarchal government in the hopes of locating a missing freighter crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must tend to her flock when she finds three misfit crewmembers need some special attention.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Impostors jeopardize Voyager's good reputation in the Delta Quadrant.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded during an away mission, B'Elanna finds herself the inspiration for a young poet's art.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An old friend returns with a decidedly unfriendly plot to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor seizes an opportunity to save the life of the man who created him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix recounts the harrowing tale of Voyager's newest uninvited guest.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Captain Janeway faces her biggest battle yet against the Borg—assimilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven's long-lost love lures Janeway into a deadly encounter with the Borg Queen.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A malfunction in Seven's cortical node threatens to destroy her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tom and B'Elanna's relationship could be the loser when Tom enters a race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok's investigation of a series of mysterious attacks aboard Voyager leads him to a most unlikely suspect: himself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to work on an alien ship where patients' care is determined by their social status instead of medical need.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Starfleet Lt. Barclay's hologram convinces Janeway to pursue a dangerous, untested plan to bring Voyager home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor experiences physical sensations for the first time after Seven downloads his matrix into her body.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Using the communications stones, Lt. Scott and Camile Wray use their time back on Earth to visit those they’ve left behind. Aboard Destiny, the crew stumbles upon a piece of Ancient technology that carries the promise of a way home.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when a member of the crew is found dead from a gunshot wound. While it appears to be suicide, the gun is nowhere to be found…until it shows up in Col. Young’s (Louis Ferreira) quarters and he becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the planet Simarka, where the fierce race of Shavadai mistreat females, Capt. Samantha Carter (Amanda Tapping) challenges their ways in a thrilling battle of wits that may bring women equity or forever keep them as second-class citizens.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Returning from a planet with both a civilized and primitive side, all but two of the team become infected and spread a brutal virus. Will Teal'c and Jackson find the cause, or are their colleagues doomed to become Stone Age primitives?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team is sent after the SG-9 team that has failed to return. They find that the team's captain (William Russ), having been treated like a god by planetary inhabitants, is drunk with power and is tyrannizing them. Can they overcome him?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A strange crystal strikes down O'Neill, replacing him with a double that returns with the team to Earth to find the cause of O'Neill's private grief...his son's death. But the double is dangerously unstable. Can O'Neill return home to save everyone?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a planned ambush goes disastrously wrong, resulting in fatalities among the SG-1 team, the peace-loving Nox restore them to life. But while these gentle people can bring back the dead, can they resist the deadly technology of the Goa'uld?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the mysterious planet Argos, the beautiful Kynthia seduces Colonel Jack O'Neill, which means he's condemned to an Argosian lifespan of only a hundred days. As he turns gray, will his team succeed in their frantic search for a cure?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Looking for allies against the Goa'uld, the SG-1 team lands on Cimmeria, home of the legendary Norse gods. Teal'c and O'Neill are transported to an underground labyrinth of caves of the vicious creature Unas. Can Carter & Daniel rescue them?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Dr. Daniel Jackson discovers that in 1945, a young professor slipped through the Stargate, never to return. Together with his still living fiancée, the SG-1 team discovers the now aged professor trapped in a decaying fortress.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With the proviso that he bring back a Goa'uld larva for study, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns to Chulak to stop the Goa'uld from enslaving his son Rya'c. Trouble is, Rya'c needs a larva to survive - and the only one available is Teal'c's.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns from the planet Oannes in a panic and minus Daniel Jackson, who was last seen being consumed by a column of flames. But as his comrades mourn him on Earth, Daniel is the captive of an amphibious humanoid creature known as Nem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The evil Goa'uld Hathor (Suanne Braun) escapes from a Mayan pyramid in Mexico. At the Stargate facility, she uses her charms to seduce the men into helping her take over the world. Can Samantha Carter and her female colleagues defeat her?

programme.title: Stingray Djazz

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Brandi and her buddy set the wayback machine and discover a roaring good time; Darrell makes the most of the little he's got; Kenny fills his piggy bank while courting an unfamiliar pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod hopes that scoring more lockers will prevent Brandi from closing the store in Long Beach; Ivy attempts to intimidate the other bidders; Rene's cockiness could prove to be a detriment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, Calif.; Mary must stay within her budget; Rene tries a secret strategy; Jarrod and Brandi try to hit the auctions with style.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave drives up the bidding in La Verne, Calif.; Darrell works alone; Jarrod and Brandi try a new system.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders roll into La Habra, Calif.; Darrell squares off against a former professional fighter; Jarrod and Brandi meet a nerd; Barry relaxes with a famous golfing friend.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry Weiss and his cohort, Kenny, share behind-the scenes moments and commentary from favorite episodes of the series.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life. Extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart. Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary. An outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: The 1980s computing boom through the eyes of a visionary, an engineer and a prodigy as they chart the changing culture in Texas' Silicon Prairie.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After surviving a visit from IBM, Joe's team must overcome internal differences and begin the technical feat of building the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Cameron struggle to make Joe's vision a reality while Joe and Bosworth attempt to procure capital to fund the making of the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: As Cameron nears completion of the BIOS, a crisis threatens the project's future and requires all hands on deck to save the machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron bristles under a new manager as Joe and Gordon attempt to procure a key piece of new technology for the computer.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A breakthrough by Cameron places her at odds with Gordon and leaves Joe to make a difficult decision. Hurricane Alicia spurs personal revelations.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Jim starts behaving uncharacteristically, Melinda learns Jim is being haunted by the ghost of an ex-con, Julian Borgia, who has been attached to Jim ever since Jim was unable to save Julian's life in route to the hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Soon after Melinda's car is stolen by a troubled teenage boy, Kirk Jensen, Kirk's dead mother, Lacy, sends Melinda messages through Electronic Voice Phenomena (EVP) or "white noise" in her car radio and other electronics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A young bride-to-be is haunted by the dead wife, Ursula, of her fiancé before their upcoming wedding. Melinda learns Ursula died in a car crash on the way to her wedding reception with Mark, and now she can't bear to see Mark marry someone else.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When an up and coming boxing sensation is haunted by the ghost of his mother, whose death caused a rift between him and his father, Melinda must broker peace between them before the mother can crossover.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: While Andrea prepares to do standup at a nearby comedy club that is closing its doors, Melinda encounters a troubled dead stand-up comedian (Marty Golden), who is haunting the old comedy club, along with other dead comics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda's mysterious new neighbor is haunted by an old classmate's dead grandfather, who suspects Tom kidnapped and killed his granddaughter.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an executed prisoner seeks Melinda's help in uncovering a contract for his valuable paintings before they're sold and his estranged daughter and struggling artist doesn't see a penny of what the contract says she is entitled to.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda's first ghost reappears, her presence triggers Melinda to remember when she first discovered her "gift" and the strain it put on her relationship with her mother, who couldn't understand what Melinda was going through.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the ghost of Andrea's friend starts haunting her, Andrea learns that he was hospitalized in a hiking accident and every time he flat lines, his ghost tries to give her clues.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda and Andrea help a workaholic fashion designer Christine Greeneauction her belongings, Melinda discovers Christine and her baby daughter's nanny are being haunted by the malicious ghost of Christine's son Daniel.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a traveling carnival comes to Grandview, Melinda encounters the revengeful ghost of a magician (Edward), who thinks his death during an underwater escape stunt wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an African American man attacked and killed during a fight with a white co-worker in the 1970's, haunts the former prosecutor turned judge.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda falls and injures her head, she wakes up to a world without ghosts and fears she has lost her "gift".

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the heat goes out at Melinda's house and shop, and Melinda gets strange visits from a flight attendant ghost who complains of being cold, Melinda welcomes the ability to help a ghost again but can't make sense of the messages she is being sent.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Time Travails: The turtles get sucked into a time travelling adventure by the somewhat vapid but totally cute Renet, Apprentice Timestress.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Hun on the Run: Hun's always been loyal, but too many failures have tarnished his relationship with his master. But, when Karai is captured by Bishop, the Shredder gives Hun a mission in which he can redeem himself: save Karai and bring her back alive.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Reality Check: Ultimate Drako is back and he's causing all sorts of chaos with the Time Scepter. He's sent the four turtles spinning through time into alternate realities.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Across The Universe: Because of Ultimate Drako's machinations, Raphael finds himself in an alternate reality … of the Planet Racers. This right down Raphael's alley … until that alley turns into a dead end and he's heading right for it!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Same as it Never Was: Ultimate Drako's time manipulations have sent Donatello to an alternate reality … and it's not pretty. It's one possible future, a horrible nightmare. The Shredder is all powerful.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 1: Ultimate Drako is causing trouble with the Time Scepter. He blasts Leonardo into another dimension … Usagi Yojimbo's dimension.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 2: Leonardo and Usagi arrive in the Battle Nexus hoping for a way to reunite the four turtles and their master. But, they find the Battle Nexus under the control of the evil Ultimate Drako. Master Splinter is his prisoner.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bishop's Gambit: Bishop is back and making his move. His research demands a mutated specimen closer to human … a rat: Master Splinter. Bishop kidnaps Splinter and moves to finish the creation of his genetically enhanced super soldiers.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Exodus - Part 1: Splinter receives a vision of his Master Yoshi…and a mission. He must stop the Shredder. Time is running out. He doesn't know how to explain it to his sons, but they need no explanation. They're with their father to the bitter end.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Exodus - Part 2: The Shredder is leaving earth in a spaceship of his own construction intent upon wreaking havoc on the Utroms and the galaxy. But, he's taken on some unwanted passengers and, they're not about to let the Shredder get away.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Cousin Sid: Casey and April bring the Turtles and Splinter to Casey's farmhouse to heal up from the beating they took in the final fight with the Shredder. But before they can start to recover, Casey's cousin Sid crashes the scene…

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The People's Choice: Out camping for the night, the four turtles find themselves in the middle of an election. It's not any ordinary election. The two female candidates are from a distant planet where the political process is trial by combat.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Sons of the Silent Age: Taking a Huck Finn styled trip down a local river, the turtles, Casey and April discover a nuclear power plant … as well as mermen of Y'Lantias … the last of their kind.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Dragon's Brew: Hun's taking the Purple Dragons to new heights. He hijacks a top-secret government shipment…one of Bishop's little surprises.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: I, Monster: On a training exercise in an abandoned brickworks in the boroughs, Casey Jones and our four turtles run afoul of a strange "man." This is the Rat King… and even though they don't know it, the turtles have met him before.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Mikey's blowing off trainings more than ever; he's the BattleNexus Champion, after all! Who needs training?

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Wing and a Prayer: It's a bird! It's a plane! Okay, it's this guy with angel wings, an Avian, named Raptarr who is after this other guy with metal wings, named Mephos, who wants to take over the Avians' flying city.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bad Day: Everything goes from bad to worse for the turtles. Life spins out of control in a nightmare of horror and pain. Who is behind all this? How will it ever end? P.S. Your cat is …

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Aliens Among Us: It looks as if Agent Bishop might find himself out of a job or at least out of funding. With the President in New York City, the turtles are out watching the motorcade when they find themselves right in the middle a new alien invasion!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Dragons Rising: Hun wasn't kidding. The Purple Dragons really are going places. They're fast becoming a world-class crime organization. But, Casey's still got a score to settle with Hun … big crime syndicate or no.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Still Nobody: A gang of young toughs, filling the void left by the rising Purple Dragons, is out to bash an old man to keep him from testifying against them.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: All Hallows Thieves: It's Halloween and all the freaks are out … especially the King of Thieves. He manages to bring to life an old idol, which wreaks havoc upon the town with its legions of gremlins.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Samurai Tourist: Usagi and Gen come to New York for a visit with the turtles. Gen gets a little carried away by the bright lights and the big city and goes wandering off on his own. Bishop hears of another possible "alien" presence.

programme.title: TMNT

programme.title: TMNT

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a black businessman (Randy Brooks) comes to Sparta to buy the town's newspaper, and it is suspected that he is romancing the paper's married white owner (Nana Visitor). Carroll O'Connor and Howard Rollins star.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams make their way to Panama City, where they come face-to-face with their fears as they take in astonishing views of the city skyline.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After racing through 4 continents, 20 cities and nearly 40,000 miles, the final three teams race to Atlanta, Ga., where a smooth landing evades one team as their competition soars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As 11 Teams depart Santa Barbara, Calif. for Santa Barbara, Argentina, one team struggles to keep their nerves at bay. Meanwhile, Teams quickly discover winning $1 million may be tougher than expected when they find themselves skydiving at 10,000 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Buenos Aires, Argentina, where the stress of the Race causes one Team to break down into tears. Meanwhile, chaos ensues when Racers are required to sharpen their numerical skills at the world's largest cattle market.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Paraguay for the first time ever, as Teams struggle to produce during a fruity challenge, and Racers face a harsh reality if they fail to perfect a local balancing act.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An unexpected beheading occurs as teams polish off a dirty task, and a random act of kindness leaves one team in tears.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams scour King Ludwig's quarters in the same castle that served as the inspiration for Sleeping Beauty's castle, and tempers flare during one Team's walk through a snowy labyrinth.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Two Teams hit the hay to see how well they stack up and Racers break out the sponges for an oily detour during the series first ever trip to Azerbaijan.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tears are shed as the claws come out in Tanzania and racers stand in amazement as they train alongside the Masai warriors.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race takes an unexpected turn when an early alliance is betrayed, and an unforgiving team savors the opportunity to exact their revenge in a game twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Gender disparities cause one Team to lose faith when a challenge seems insurmountable, and emotions run high as a Racer must weigh their own well-being against their future in the game.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One determined Racer powers through pain in the wake of a physical misstep, and teams pull out all of the bells and whistles for a larger than life challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Atlanta, una banda armada sorprende al grupo de Rick mientras están buscando a Merle. Entretanto, en el campamento, Jim empieza a comportarse de forma extraña, tiene premoniciones y asusta a los niños con una tragedia que se aproxima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick encuentra una granja en la que buscar ayuda para salvar la vida de su hijo, quien recibió el impacto accidental de una bala. Después, Shane entra en una escuela llena de zombis para llevarse material sanitario junto al tipo que disparó a Carl.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin add task lighting to a Brooklyn kitchen. The guys play "What Is It" with Jimmy Fallon in Times Square. Roger visits the High Line. Tom adds a cable railing system to a Greenwich Village deck.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey heads to Colorado Springs to install a new kitchen sink and faucet. Then, general contractor Tom Silva installs insulated sidelights on a front door.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Landscape contractor Roger Cook works with a fencing contractor to install a vinyl privacy fence. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Richard replaces a clogged shower valve

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva installs interior window trim. Then, Richard Trethewey installs a new device that will heat a swimming pool for free using the excess heat produced by a central air conditioner.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Landscape contractor Roger Cook shows a homeowner how to properly mulch his garden beds. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Richard installs a natural gas line for a barbeque grill.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In the workshop, general contractor Tom Silva demonstrates the proper way to use hand planes. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Roger helps a homeowner repair a cracked stone walkway.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Scott head to Denver to install a ceiling fan on a cathedral ceiling. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Richard visits New Jersey to install a water softener.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger temporarily transplants a mature rose bush. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows Kevin some rookie plumbing mistakes. And, Tom and Kevin replace old outdoor lighting with new fixtures.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor heads to Del Ray Beach, Florida to restore Terrazzo floors. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner repair a cracked floor joist.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard heads to Cheyenne, Wyoming to help a homeowner install a toilet. The guys ask "What Is It?" And, Roger and Kevin patch a lawn with grass seed.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott helps hang a flat panel TV on the wall and conceal wiring. Scott shows Kevin examples of many different types of electrical outlets. Roger helps control insect pests without using pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns how to maintain kitchen appliances. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner install a rain gutter, downspout, and rain barrel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a storage bench for an entryway. Richard demonstrates how to solder copper pipes properly. Afterward, landscape contractor Roger Cook helps maintain an overgrown perennial garden.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger visits a tropical botanic garden to learn how to care for orchids as houseplants. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner purchase and install a kitchen wall cabinet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns corn harvesting and storage, then helps seal and insulate ductwork. Roger shares advice on proper pruning. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin shows how to maintain washers & dryers.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard and Kevin install a ductless heat pump. The guys ask "What Is It?" Scott demonstrates new technologies and applications for LED lighting. Roger shows how to select the best houseplants.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps solve the mystery of melted vinyl siding. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Kevin and a specialist perform a whole-house energy audit.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin demonstrate how to use all types of ladders. Richard replaces a three-handle shower valve with a single-handle anti-scald valve.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott installs several types of surge protection. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Roger demonstrates how to cut and shape stones for hardscaping projects.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and an expert fabricate and install custom concrete countertops. Richard shows how to make watertight connections without soldering. Roger demonstrates several new cordless landscape tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns how subway trains are serviced then helps a homeowner paint kitchen cabinets. Roger teaches how to estimate landscape material by the cubic yard. Richard installs a smart thermostat to reduce energy use.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin teaches the guys how to use Twitter. Tom replaces an old, rusted bulkhead door. And the guys ask "What Is It?" Richard discusses several ways to get hot water without waiting.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger builds a garden bed for chile pepper plants in New Mexico. Richard repairs a leaky toilet with a worn out flange. And the guys ask "What Is It?" Where to find it?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard replaces a leaking kitchen faucet with a hands-free model. Kevin explains rechargeable batteries. The guys ask WHAT IS IT? and Roger installs a drain in a driveway to divert rainwater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs a new, pre-hung front door. Richard discusses an important water heater safety device. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Roger shows how to use big containers for screening and shading.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Santa Fe and installs a shade sail over a deck. Roger shows the proper way to use a wheelbarrow. And Richard installs a hybrid water heater that saves energy.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a leaky skylight. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard repairs a noisy toilet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has guilt feelings about not standing up to the tough guy who makes a play for Chrissy at the local pub and goes back the next night to tell the Casanova off.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Panic reigns in the apartment when Mr. Roper takes the rent money without leaving the girls and Jack a receipt, making them think their place was robbed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy walk in while Janet is entertaining a date, fostering a new rule on privacy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, realizing he can't meet his obligations to pay his share of the rent, gets a part-time modeling job only to find out that he's expected to pose nude. Guest Star(s): Sally Kirkland

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy apparently do Janet a disfavor by talking her into trying for a promotion at the florist shop where she works.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Chrissy and Janet go away for the weekend, Jack throws a wild party and Stanley Roper gets the morning-after blues.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy falls for an older man she meets at the supermarket. Jack is jealous, but he's even more upset when Mr. Roper tells Jack and Janet that she knows the man's wife. Guest Star(s): Dick Sargeant

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet moves in with Mrs. Roper while Mr. Roper is away on business, then stews about Jack and Chrissy being alone for the night in the trio's upstairs apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Greed tarnishes Mr. Roper's integrity when he is led to believe his old car is a valuable classic after he has sold it for $200 to Jack, Janet, and Chrissy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy, whose skills in the kitchen aren't exactly sharp, invites a gourmet to share a home-cooked dinner, then pleads with Jack to be her secret stand-in-chef.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack defends Chrissy's honor when a man who misunderstood her friendliness shows up at the apartment and no one knows he's a cop. Guest Star(s): James Cromwell

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Only Jack knows the truth when Chrissy, Janet, and Mrs. Roper think that Stanley is fooling around with another woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet loses her cool when the groovy guy and campus Adonis of her high school shows up for a date, and Jack and Chrissy conspire to leave them alone in the apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper's on a rampage for the rent so Jack's visiting uncle, a charming rascal, passes him a bad check.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A ruffled Helen Roper takes a cafeteria job to teach husband Stanley a lesson, but returns a wreck from the experience.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Janet, and Chrissy plot to escape a boring Christmas party alone with the Ropers because the three roommates are invited to a big bash the same night.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 1
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2018, Emanuel Navarrete fought Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title at the Madison Square Garden Theater in New York. Navarrete was the more aggressive fighter in the match, earning the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 2
programme.desc: On May 11th, 2019, Emanuel Navarrete rematched Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title in Tucson. Navarrete put on an impressive performance, scoring two knockdowns and stopping Dogboe in the final round.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Joet Gonzalez
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021, Emanuel Navarrete fought Joet Gonzalez for the WBO World Featherweight Title at Pechanga Arena in San Diego. In an incredible battle, Emanuel Navarrete pulled out an impressive unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs In Jin Chi
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001, Erik Morales fought In Jin Chi for the WBC Featherweight Title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles. Defending his title, Erik Morales put on the pressure to do enough to get the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil and Jase get into an argument about which type of duck decoy works best, Jase and the guys repaint some old decoys, betting that Phil cannot tell the difference.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys discover they have a knack for removing pests from other people's property, they use their new talents to their advantage. Meanwhile, Willie gives Sadie and John Luke summer jobs at his diner.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When an office prank war spirals out of control, Phil volunteers Willie, Jase, and Jep to help Alan at the church, which seems more like a punishment than charity work.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the guys spend the weekend at a hunting cabin to celebrate Martin's bachelor party, things turn explosive after they find a cache of antique black powder weapons. Meanwhile, Willie helps Kay fulfill her lifelong dream of owning a petting zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Uncle Si has a brush with death, he creates a bucket list and asks the guys to help him fulfill his dreams. Meanwhile, Kay sets out to prove to Willie and Alan that she actually graduated high school.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Duck Commander sponsors a NASCAR race, Jase and the guys get themselves in the mood by attempting to work as a pit crew. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie challenge John Luke and his fiance Mary Kate to a doubles tennis match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: In this very special wedding episode, John Luke Robertson is getting married to his fiancee Mary Kate, and our cameras are with him every step of the way.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when it Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
